name: crustle

description: Its skin has a rubbery elasticity, so it can reduce damage by defensively pulling its skin up to its neck.
name: scraggy

description: Groups of them beat up anything that enters their territory. Each can spit acidic liquid from its mouth.
name: scrafty

description: They never vary the route they fly, because their memories of guarding an ancient city remain steadfast.
name: sigilyph

description: Each of them carries a mask that used to be its face when it was human. Sometimes they look at it and cry.
name: yamask

description: It has been said that they swallow those who get too close and turn them into mummies. They like to eat gold nuggets.
name: cofagrigus

description: Restored from a fossil, this Pokémon can dive to depths beyond half a mile.
name: tirtouga

description: They can live both in the ocean and on land. A slap from one of them is enough to open a hole in the bottom of a tanker.
name: carracosta

description: Said to be an ancestor of bird Pokémon, they were unable to fly and moved about by hopping from one branch to another.
name: archen

description: They are intelligent and will cooperate to catch prey. From the ground, they use a running start to take flight.
name: archeops

description: Inhaling the gas they belch will make you sleep for a week. They prefer unsanitary places.
name: trubbish

description: It clenches opponents with its left arm and finishes them off with foul-smelling poison gas belched from its mouth.
name: garbodor

description: It changes into the forms of others to surprise them. Apparently, it often transforms into a silent child.
name: zorua

description: Bonds between these Pokémon are very strong. It protects the safety of its pack by tricking its opponents.
name: zoroark

description: They greet one another by rubbing each other with their tails, which are always kept well groomed and clean.
name: minccino

description: Their white fur is coated in a special oil that makes it easy for them to deflect attacks.
name: cinccino

description: Their ribbonlike feelers increase their psychic power. They are always staring at something.
name: gothita

description: They use hypnosis to control people and Pokémon. Tales of Gothorita leading people astray are told in every corner.
name: gothorita

description: Starry skies thousands of light-years away are visible in the space distorted by their intense psychic power.
name: gothitelle

description: They drive away attackers by unleashing psychic power. They can use telepathy to talk with others.
name: solosis

description: Since they have two divided brains, at times they suddenly try to take two different actions at once.
name: duosion

description: When Reuniclus shake hands, a network forms between their brains, increasing their psychic power.
name: reuniclus

description: These bird Pokémon are excellent divers. They swim around in the water eating their favorite food--peat moss.
name: ducklett

description: Swanna start to dance at dusk. The one dancing in the middle is the leader of the flock.
name: swanna

description: The temperature of their breath is -58° F. They create snow crystals and make snow fall in the areas around them.
name: vanillite

description: Snowy mountains are this Pokémon’s habitat. During an ancient ice age, they moved to southern areas.
name: vanillish

description: Swallowing large amounts of water, they make snow clouds inside their bodies and attack their foes with violent blizzards.
name: vanilluxe

description: The color and scent of their fur changes to match the mountain grass. When they sense hostility, they hide in the grass.
name: deerling

description: They migrate according to the seasons. People can tell the season by looking at Sawsbuck’s horns.
name: sawsbuck

description: The energy made in its cheeks’ electric pouches is stored inside its membrane and released while it is gliding.
name: emolga

description: These mysterious Pokémon evolve when they receive electrical stimulation while they are in the same place as Shelmet.
name: karrablast

description: They fly around at high speed, striking with their pointed spears. Even when in trouble, they face opponents bravely.
name: escavalier

description: It lures people in with its Poké Ball pattern, then releases poison spores. Why it resembles a Poké Ball is unknown.
name: foongus

description: It lures prey close by dancing and waving its arm caps, which resemble Poké Balls, in a swaying motion.
name: amoonguss

description: With its thin, veil-like arms wrapped around the body of its opponent, it sinks to the ocean floor.
name: frillish-male

description: The fate of the ships and crew that wander into Jellicent’s habitat: all sunken, all lost, all vanished.
name: jellicent-male

description: The special membrane enveloping Alomomola has the ability to heal wounds.
name: alomomola

description: Joltik that live in cities have learned a technique for sucking electricity from the outlets in houses.
name: joltik

description: When attacked, they create an electric barrier by spitting out many electrically charged threads.
name: galvantula

description: When threatened, it attacks by shooting a barrage of spikes, which gives it a chance to escape by rolling away.
name: ferroseed

description: It fights by swinging around its three spiky feelers. A hit from these steel spikes can reduce a boulder to rubble.
name: ferrothorn

description: The two minigears that mesh together are predetermined. Each will rebound from other minigears without meshing.
name: klink

description: By changing the direction in which it rotates, it communicates its feelings to others. When angry, it rotates faster.
name: klang

description: The gear with the red core is rotated at high speed for a rapid energy charge.
name: klinklang

description: While one alone doesn’t have much power, a chain of many Tynamo can be as powerful as lightning.
name: tynamo

description: They coil around foes and shock them with electricity-generating organs that seem simply to be circular patterns.
name: eelektrik

description: They crawl out of the ocean using their arms. They will attack prey on shore and immediately drag it into the ocean.
name: eelektross

description: It uses its strong psychic power to squeeze its opponent’s brain, causing unendurable headaches.
name: elgyem

description: It can manipulate an opponent’s memory. Apparently, it communicates by flashing its three different-colored fingers.
name: beheeyem

description: Litwick shines a light that absorbs the life energy of people and Pokémon, which becomes the fuel that it burns.
name: litwick

description: This ominous Pokémon is feared. Through cities it wanders, searching for the spirits of the fallen.
name: lampent

description: It absorbs a spirit, which it then burns. By waving the flames on its arms, it puts its foes into a hypnotic trance.
name: chandelure

description: They use their tusks to crush the berries they eat. Repeated regrowth makes their tusks strong and sharp.
name: axew

description: Since a broken tusk will not grow back, they diligently sharpen their tusks on river rocks after they’ve been fighting.
name: fraxure

description: They are kind but can be relentless when defending territory. They challenge foes with tusks that can cut steel.
name: haxorus

description: When it is not feeling well, its mucus gets watery and the power of its Ice-type moves decreases.
name: cubchoo

description: It can make its breath freeze at will. Very able in the water, it swims around in northern seas and catches prey.
name: beartic

description: When its body temperature goes up, it turns into steam and vanishes. When its temperature lowers, it returns to ice.
name: cryogonal

description: When attacked, it defends itself by closing the lid of its shell. It can spit a sticky, poisonous liquid.
name: shelmet

description: When its body dries out, it weakens. So, to prevent dehydration, it wraps itself in many layers of thin membrane.
name: accelgor

description: Its skin is very hard, so it is unhurt even if stepped on by sumo wrestlers. It smiles when transmitting electricity.
name: stunfisk

description: In fights, they dominate with onslaughts of flowing, continuous attacks. With their sharp claws, they cut enemies.
name: mienfoo

description: It wields the fur on its arms like a whip. Its arm attacks come with such rapidity that they cannot even be seen.
name: mienshao

description: It warms its body by absorbing sunlight with its wings. When its body temperature falls, it can no longer move.
name: druddigon

description: The energy that burns inside it enables it to move, but no one has yet been able to identify this energy.
name: golett

description: It flies across the sky at Mach speeds. Removing the seal on its chest makes its internal energy go out of control.
name: golurk

description: Blades comprise this Pokémon’s entire body. If battling dulls the blades, it sharpens them on stones by the river.
name: pawniard

description: It leads a group of Pawniard. It battles to become the boss, but will be driven from the group if it loses.
name: bisharp

description: Their fluffy fur absorbs damage, even if they strike foes with a fierce headbutt.
name: bouffalant

description: They crush berries with their talons. They bravely stand up to any opponent, no matter how strong it is.
name: rufflet

description: They fight for their friends without any thought about danger to themselves. One can carry a car while flying.
name: braviary

description: Their wings are too tiny to allow them to fly. They guard their posteriors with bones that were gathered by Mandibuzz.
name: vullaby

description: It makes a nest out of bones it finds. It grabs weakened prey in its talons and hauls it to its nest of bones.
name: mandibuzz

description: It breathes through a hole in its tail while it burns with an internal fire. Durant is its prey.
name: heatmor

description: They attack in groups, covering themselves in steel armor to protect themselves from Heatmor.
name: durant

description: It tends to bite everything, and it is not a picky eater. Approaching it carelessly is dangerous.
name: deino

description: After it has eaten up all the food in its territory, it moves to another area. Its two heads do not get along.
name: zweilous

description: This brutal Pokémon travels the skies on its six wings. Anything that moves seems like a foe to it, triggering its attack.
name: hydreigon

description: This Pokémon was believed to have been born from the sun. When it evolves, its entire body is engulfed in flames.
name: larvesta

description: When volcanic ash darkened the atmosphere, it is said that Volcarona’s fire provided a replacement for the sun.
name: volcarona

description: This legendary Pokémon battled against humans to protect Pokémon. Its personality is calm and composed.
name: cobalion

description: This Pokémon came to the defense of Pokémon that had lost their homes in a war among humans.
name: terrakion

description: This Pokémon fought humans in order to protect its friends. Legends about it continue to be passed down.
name: virizion

description: The lower half of its body is wrapped in a cloud of energy. It zooms through the sky at 200 mph.
name: tornadus-incarnate

description: Countless charred remains mar the landscape of places through which Thundurus has passed.
name: thundurus-incarnate

description: This Pokémon appears in legends. It sends flames into the air from its tail, burning up everything around it.
name: reshiram

description: Concealing itself in lightning clouds, it flies throughout the Unova region. It creates electricity in its tail.
name: zekrom

description: Lands visited by Landorus grant such bountiful crops that it has been hailed as “The Guardian of the Fields.”
name: landorus-incarnate

description: It generates a powerful, freezing energy inside itself, but its body became frozen when the energy leaked out.
name: kyurem

description: By blasting water from its hooves, it can glide across water. It excels at using leg moves while battling.
name: keldeo-ordinary

description: Its melodies are sung with a special vocalization method that can control the feelings of those who hear it.
name: meloetta-aria

description: Over 300 million years ago, it was feared as the strongest of hunters. It has been modified by Team Plasma.
name: genesect

description: The quills on its head are usually soft. When it flexes them, the points become so hard and sharp that they can pierce rock.
name: chespin

description: It relies on its sturdy shell to deflect predators’ attacks. It counterattacks with its sharp quills.
name: quilladin

description: Its Tackle is forceful enough to flip a 50-ton tank. It shields its allies from danger with its own body.
name: chesnaught

description: Eating a twig fills it with energy, and its roomy ears give vent to air hotter than 390 degrees Fahrenheit.
name: fennekin

description: It has a twig stuck in its tail. With friction from its tail fur, it sets the twig on fire and launches into battle.
name: braixen

description: It gazes into the flame at the tip of its branch to achieve a focused state, which allows it to see into the future.
name: delphox

description: It secretes flexible bubbles from its chest and back. The bubbles reduce the damage it would otherwise take when attacked.
name: froakie

description: It can throw bubble-covered pebbles with precise control, hitting empty cans up to a hundred feet away.
name: frogadier

description: It creates throwing stars out of compressed water. When it spins them and throws them at high speed, these stars can split metal in two.
name: greninja

description: They use their large ears to dig burrows. They will dig the whole night through.
name: bunnelby

description: With their powerful ears, they can heft boulders of a ton or more with ease. They can be a big help at construction sites.
name: diggersby

description: These friendly Pokémon send signals to one another with beautiful chirps and tail-feather movements.
name: fletchling

description: From its beak, it expels embers that set the tall grass on fire. Then it pounces on the bewildered prey that pop out of the grass.
name: fletchinder

description: In the fever of an exciting battle, it showers embers from the gaps between its feathers and takes to the air.
name: talonflame

description: When under attack from bird Pokémon, it spews a poisonous black powder that causes paralysis on contact.
name: scatterbug

description: It lives hidden within thicket shadows. When predators attack, it quickly bristles the fur covering its body in an effort to threaten them.
name: spewpa

description: Vivillon with many different patterns are found all over the world. These patterns are affected by the climate of their habitat.
name: vivillon

description: The stronger the opponent it faces, the more heat surges from its mane and the more power flows through its body.
name: litleo

description: The male with the largest mane of fire is the leader of the pride.
name: pyroar-male

description: It draws out and controls the hidden power of flowers. The flower Flabébé holds is most likely part of its body.
name: flabebe

description: It flutters around fields of flowers and cares for flowers that are starting to wilt. It draws out the hidden power of flowers to battle.
name: floette

description: It claims exquisite flower gardens as its territory, and it obtains power from basking in the energy emitted by flowering plants.
name: florges

description: Thought to be one of the first Pokémon to live in harmony with humans, it has a placid disposition.
name: skiddo

description: It can tell how its Trainer is feeling by subtle shifts in the grip on its horns. This empathic sense lets them run as if one being.
name: gogoat

description: It does its best to be taken seriously by its enemies, but its glare is not sufficiently intimidating. Chewing on a leaf is its trademark.
name: pancham

description: Although it possesses a violent temperament, it won’t put up with bullying. It uses the leaf in its mouth to sense the movements of its enemies.
name: pangoro

description: Trimming its fluffy fur not only makes it more elegant but also increases the swiftness of its movements.
name: furfrou

description: The organ that emits its intense psychic power is sheltered by its ears to keep power from leaking out.
name: espurr

description: When in danger, it raises its ears and releases enough psychic power to grind a 10-ton truck into dust.
name: meowstic-male

description: Apparently this Pokémon is born when a departed spirit inhabits a sword. It attaches itself to people and drinks their life force.
name: honedge

description: When Honedge evolves, it divides into two swords, which cooperate via telepathy to coordinate attacks and slash their enemies to ribbons.
name: doublade

description: Generations of kings were attended by these Pokémon, which used their spectral power to manipulate and control people and Pokémon.
name: aegislash-shield

description: It emits a scent that enraptures those who smell it. This fragrance changes depending on what it has eaten.
name: spritzee

description: It devises various scents, pleasant and unpleasant, and emits scents that its enemies dislike in order to gain an edge in battle.
name: aromatisse

description: To entangle its opponents in battle, it extrudes white threads as sweet and sticky as cotton candy.
name: swirlix

description: It can distinguish the faintest of scents. It puts its sensitive sense of smell to use by helping pastry chefs in their work.
name: slurpuff

description: Opponents who stare at the flashing of the light-emitting spots on its body become dazed and lose their will to fight.
name: inkay

description: It wields the most compelling hypnotic powers of any Pokémon, and it forces others to do whatever it wants.
name: malamar

description: Two Binacle live together on one rock. When they fight, one of them will move to a different rock.
name: binacle

description: When they evolve, two Binacle multiply into seven. They fight with the power of seven Binacle.
name: barbaracle

description: Camouflaged as rotten kelp, they spray liquid poison on prey that approaches unawares and then finish it off.
name: skrelp

description: Their poison is strong enough to eat through the hull of a tanker, and they spit it indiscriminately at anything that enters their territory.
name: dragalge

description: They knock down flying prey by firing compressed water from their massive claws like shooting a pistol.
name: clauncher

description: Their enormous claws launch cannonballs of water powerful enough to pierce tanker hulls.
name: clawitzer

description: They make their home in deserts. They can generate their energy from basking in the sun, so eating food is not a requirement.
name: helioptile

description: They flare their frills and generate energy. A single Heliolisk can generate sufficient electricity to power a skyscraper.
name: heliolisk

description: This Pokémon was restored from a fossil. If something happens that it doesn’t like, it throws a tantrum and runs wild.
name: tyrunt

description: Thanks to its gargantuan jaws, which could shred thick metal plates as if they were paper, it was invincible in the ancient world it once inhabited.
name: tyrantrum

description: This ancient Pokémon was restored from part of its body that had been frozen in ice for over 100 million years.
name: amaura

description: The diamond-shaped crystals on its body expel air as cold as -240 degrees Fahrenheit, surrounding its enemies and encasing them in ice.
name: aurorus

description: It sends a soothing aura from its ribbonlike feelers to calm fights.
name: sylveon

description: Although its body is small, its proficient fighting skills enable it to keep up with big bruisers like Machamp and Hariyama.
name: hawlucha

description: Its whiskers serve as antennas. By sending and receiving electrical waves, it can communicate with others over vast distances.
name: dedenne

description: Born from the temperatures and pressures deep underground, it fires beams from the stone in its head.
name: carbink

description: The weakest Dragon-type Pokémon, it lives in damp, shady places, so its body doesn’t dry out.
name: goomy

description: It drives away opponents by excreting a sticky liquid that can dissolve anything. Its eyes devolved, so it can’t see anything.
name: sliggoo

description: This very friendly Dragon-type Pokémon will hug its beloved Trainer, leaving that Trainer covered in sticky slime.
name: goodra

description: These key collectors threaten any attackers by fiercely jingling their keys at them.
name: klefki

description: These Pokémon are created when spirits possess rotten tree stumps. They prefer to live in abandoned forests.
name: phantump

description: It can control trees at will. It will trap people who harm the forest, so they can never leave.
name: trevenant

description: The pumpkin body is inhabited by a spirit trapped in this world. As the sun sets, it becomes restless and active.
name: pumpkaboo-average

description: Singing in eerie voices, they wander town streets on the night of the new moon. Anyone who hears their song is cursed.
name: gourgeist-average

description: It blocks opponents’ attacks with the ice that shields its body. It uses cold air to repair any cracks with new ice.
name: bergmite

description: Its ice-covered body is as hard as steel. Its cumbersome frame crushes anything that stands in its way.
name: avalugg

description: They live in pitch-black caves. Their enormous ears can emit ultrasonic waves of 200,000 hertz.
name: noibat

description: They fly around on moonless nights and attack careless prey. Nothing can beat them in a battle in the dark.
name: noivern

description: Legends say it can share eternal life. It slept for a thousand years in the form of a tree before its revival.
name: xerneas

description: When this legendary Pokémon’s wings and tail feathers spread wide and glow red, it absorbs the life force of living creatures.
name: yveltal

description: When the Kalos region’s ecosystem falls into disarray, it appears and reveals its secret power.
name: zygarde-50

description: A sudden transformation of Carbink, its pink, glimmering body is said to be the loveliest sight in the whole world.
name: diancie

description: This troublemaker sends anything and everything to faraway places using its loop, which can warp space.
name: hoopa

description: It lets out billows of steam and disappears into the dense fog. It’s said to live in mountains where humans do not tread.
name: volcanion

description: This wary Pokémon uses photosynthesis to store up energy during the day, while becoming active at night.
name: rowlet

description: A bit of a dandy, it spends its free time preening its wings. Its preoccupation with any dirt on its plumage can leave it unable to battle.
name: dartrix

description: It fires arrow quills from its wings with such precision, they can pierce a pebble at distances over a hundred yards.
name: decidueye

description: While grooming itself, it builds up fur inside its stomach. It sets the fur alight and spews fiery attacks, which change based on how it coughs.
name: litten

description: At its throat, it bears a bell of fire. The bell rings brightly whenever this Pokémon spits fire.
name: torracat

description: This Pokémon has a violent, selfish disposition. If it’s not in the mood to listen, it will ignore its Trainer’s orders with complete nonchalance.
name: incineroar

description: This Pokémon snorts body fluids from its nose, blowing balloons to smash into its foes. It’s famous for being a hard worker.
name: popplio

description: A skillful dancer, it creates a sequence of water balloons as it dances, and briskly bombards its enemies.
name: brionne

description: It controls its water balloons with song. The melody is learned from others of its kind and is passed down from one generation to the next.
name: primarina

description: It can peck at a rate of 16 times a second to drill holes in trees. It uses the holes for food storage and for nesting.
name: pikipek

description: It eats berries and stores their seeds in its beak. When it encounters enemies or prey, it fires off all the seeds in a burst.
name: trumbeak

description: When it battles, its beak heats up. The temperature can easily exceed 212 degrees Fahrenheit, causing severe burns when it hits.
name: toucannon

description: With its sharp fangs, it will bite anything. It did not originally live in Alola but was imported from another region.
name: yungoos

description: When it finds a trace of its prey, it patiently stakes out the location...but it’s always snoozing by nightfall.
name: gumshoos

description: Its strong jaw enables it to scrape trees and slurp out the sap. It normally lives underground.
name: grubbin

description: Its body is capable of storing electricity. On camping trips, people are grateful to have one around.
name: charjabug

description: It zips around, on sharp lookout for an opening. It concentrates electrical energy within its large jaws and uses it to zap its enemies.
name: vikavolt

description: While guarding its weak points with its pincers, it looks for an opening and unleashes punches. When it loses, it foams at the mouth and faints.
name: crabrawler

description: It aimed for the top but got lost and ended up on a snowy mountain. Being forced to endure the cold, this Pokémon evolved and grew fur.
name: crabominable

description: It beats its wings together to create fire. As it moves in the steps of its beautiful dance, it bathes opponents in intense flames.
name: oricorio-baile

description: It feeds on the nectar and pollen of flowers. Because it’s able to sense auras, it can identify which flowers are about to bloom.
name: cutiefly

description: It rolls up pollen into puffs. It makes many different varieties, some used as food and others used in battle.
name: ribombee

description: It’s considered to be a good Pokémon for beginners because of its friendliness, but its disposition grows rougher as it grows up.
name: rockruff

description: Its quick movements confuse its enemies. Well equipped with claws and fangs, it also uses the sharp rocks in its mane as weapons.
name: lycanroc-midday

description: When it’s in trouble, its eyes moisten and begin to shine. The shining light attracts its comrades, and they stand together against their enemies.
name: wishiwashi-solo

description: It plunges the poison spike on its head into its prey. When the prey has weakened, Mareanie deals the finishing blow with its 10 tentacles.
name: mareanie

description: Toxapex crawls along the ocean floor on its 12 legs. It leaves a trail of Corsola bits scattered in its wake.
name: toxapex

description: The mud stuck to Mudbray’s hooves enhances its grip and its powerful running gait.
name: mudbray

description: It spits a mud that provides resistance to both wind and rain, so the walls of old houses were often coated with it.
name: mudsdale

description: It crawls onto the land in search of food. Its water bubble allows it to breathe and protects its soft head.
name: dewpider

description: It delivers headbutts with the water bubble on its head. Small Pokémon get sucked into the bubble, where they drown.
name: araquanid

description: During the day, it sleeps and soaks up light. When night falls, it walks around looking for a safer place to sleep.
name: fomantis

description: It requires a lot of effort to maintain Lurantis’s vivid coloring, but some collectors enjoy this work and treat it as their hobby.
name: lurantis

description: It scatters spores that flicker and glow. Anyone seeing these lights falls into a deep slumber.
name: morelull

description: Forests where Shiinotic live are treacherous to enter at night. People confused by its strange lights can never find their way home again.
name: shiinotic

description: It burns its bodily fluids to create a poisonous gas. When its enemies become disoriented from inhaling the gas, it attacks them.
name: salandit

description: For some reason, only females have been found. It creates a reverse harem of male Salandit that it lives with.
name: salazzle

description: Despite its adorable appearance, when it gets angry and flails about, its arms and legs could knock a pro wrestler sprawling.
name: stufful

description: This immensely dangerous Pokémon possesses overwhelming physical strength. Its habitat is generally off-limits.
name: bewear

description: A delectable aroma pours from its body. They are often swallowed whole by Toucannon lured by that wafting deliciousness.
name: bounsweet

description: The sepals on its head developed to protect its body. These are quite hard, so even if pecked by bird Pokémon, this Pokémon is totally fine.
name: steenee

description: Its long, striking legs aren’t just for show but to be used to kick with skill. In victory, it shows off by kicking the defeated, laughing boisterously.
name: tsareena

description: It attaches flowers to its highly nutritious vine. This revitalizes the flowers, and they give off an aromatic scent.
name: comfey

description: Known for its extreme intelligence, this Pokémon will look down on inexperienced Trainers, so it’s best suited to veteran Trainers.
name: oranguru

description: They form groups of roughly 20 individuals. Their mutual bond is remarkable—they will never let down a comrade.
name: passimian

description: This Pokémon is a coward. As it desperately dashes off, the flailing of its many legs leaves a sparkling clean path in its wake.
name: wimpod

description: With a flashing slash of its giant sharp claws, it cleaves seawater—or even air—right in two.
name: golisopod

description: Born from a sand mound playfully built by a child, this Pokémon embodies the grudges of the departed.
name: sandygast

description: Possessed people controlled by this Pokémon transformed its sand mound into a castle. As it evolved, its power to curse grew ever stronger.
name: palossand

description: It’s covered in a slime that keeps its skin moist, allowing it to stay on land for days without drying up.
name: pyukumuku

description: The heavy control mask it wears suppresses its intrinsic capabilities. This Pokémon has some hidden special power.
name: type-null

description: Its trust in its partner is what awakens it. This Pokémon is capable of changing its type, a flexibility that is well displayed in battle.
name: silvally

description: Originally making its home in the ozone layer, it hurtles to the ground when the shell enclosing its body grows too heavy.
name: minior-red-meteor

description: It is born asleep, and it dies asleep. All its movements are apparently no more than the results of it tossing and turning in its dreams.
name: komala

description: The shell on its back is chemically unstable and explodes violently if struck. The hole in its stomach is its weak point.
name: turtonator

description: The spiny fur on its back is normally at rest. When this Pokémon becomes agitated, its fur stands on end and stabs into its attackers.
name: togedemaru

description: Its actual appearance is unknown. A scholar who saw what was under its rag was overwhelmed by terror and died from the shock.
name: mimikyu-disguised

description: When it unleashes its psychic power from the protuberance on its head, the grating sound of grinding teeth echoes through the area.
name: bruxish

description: It has a compassionate personality, but if it is angered, it completely destroys its surroundings with its intense breath.
name: drampa

description: Swinging its massive anchor, it can KO Wailord in a single blow. What appears to be green seaweed is actually its body.
name: dhelmise

description: It expresses its feelings by smacking its scales. Metallic sounds echo through the tall mountains where Jangmo-o lives.
name: jangmo-o

description: It leaps at its prey with a courageous shout. Its scaly punches tear its opponents to shreds.
name: hakamo-o

description: When it spots enemies, it threatens them by jingling the scales on its tail. Weak opponents will crack and flee in panic.
name: kommo-o

description: This guardian deity of Melemele is brimming with curiosity. It summons thunderclouds and stores their lightning inside its body.
name: tapu-koko

description: This guardian deity of Akala is guilelessly cruel. The fragrant aroma of flowers is the source of its energy.
name: tapu-lele

description: It pulls large trees up by the roots and swings them around. It causes vegetation to grow, and then it absorbs energy from the growth.
name: tapu-bulu

description: The dense fog it creates brings the downfall and destruction of its confused enemies. Ocean currents are the source of its energy.
name: tapu-fini

description: Its body is gaseous and frail. It slowly grows as it collects dust from the atmosphere.
name: cosmog

description: Motionless as if dead, its body is faintly warm to the touch. In the distant past, it was called the cocoon of the stars.
name: cosmoem

description: It is said to live in another world. The intense light it radiates from the surface of its body can make the darkest of nights light up like midday.
name: solgaleo

description: It is said to be a female evolution of Cosmog. When its third eye activates, away it flies to another world.
name: lunala

description: One of several mysterious Ultra Beasts. People on the street report observing those infested by it suddenly becoming violent.
name: nihilego

description: This Ultra Beast appeared from another world. It shows off its body, but whether that display is a boast or a threat remains unclear.
name: buzzwole

description: One of the dangerous Ultra Beasts, it has been spotted running across the land at terrific speeds.
name: pheromosa

description: One of the mysterious life-forms known as Ultra Beasts. Astonishing electric shocks emanate from its entire body, according to witnesses.
name: xurkitree

description: It appeared from the Ultra Wormhole. Witnesses observed it flying across the sky at high speed.
name: celesteela

description: This Ultra Beast came from the Ultra Wormhole. It seems not to attack enemies on its own, but its sharp body is a dangerous weapon in itself.
name: kartana

description: It has gobbled mountains and swallowed whole buildings, according to reports. It’s one of the Ultra Beasts.
name: guzzlord

description: Reminiscent of the Ultra Beasts, this life-form, apparently asleep underground, is thought to have come from another world in ancient times.
name: necrozma

description: This artificial Pokémon, constructed more than 500 years ago, can understand human speech but cannot itself speak.
name: magearna

description: Able to conceal itself in shadows, it never appears before humans, so its very existence was the stuff of myth.
name: marshadow

description: This Ultra Beast is well enough liked to be chosen as a first partner in its own world.
name: poipole

description: It stores hundreds of liters of poisonous liquid inside its body. It is one of the organisms known as UBs.
name: naganadel

description: It appeared from an Ultra Wormhole. Each one appears to be made up of many life-forms stacked one on top of each other.
name: stakataka

description: It slithers toward people. Then, without warning, it triggers the explosion of its own head. It’s apparently one kind of Ultra Beast.
name: blacephalon

description: It electrifies its claws and tears its opponents apart with them. Even if they dodge its attack, they’ll be electrocuted by the flying sparks.
name: zeraora

description: It melts particles of iron and other metals found in the subsoil, so it can absorb them into its body of molten steel.
name: meltan

description: Revered long ago for its capacity to create iron from nothing, for some reason it has come back to life after 3,000 years.
name: melmetal

description: When it uses its special stick to strike up a beat, the sound waves produced carry revitalizing energy to the plants and flowers in the area.
name: grookey

description: The faster a Thwackey can beat out a rhythm with its two sticks, the more respect it wins from its peers.
name: thwackey

description: By drumming, it taps into the power of its special tree stump. The roots of the stump follow its direction in battle.
name: rillaboom

description: A warm-up of running around gets fire energy coursing through this Pokémon’s body. Once that happens, it’s ready to fight at full power.
name: scorbunny

description: Its thick and fluffy fur protects it from the cold and enables it to use hotter fire moves.
name: raboot

description: It juggles a pebble with its feet, turning it into a burning soccer ball. Its shots strike opponents hard and leave them scorched.
name: cinderace

description: When scared, this Pokémon cries. Its tears pack the chemical punch of 100 onions, and attackers won’t be able to resist weeping.
name: sobble

description: A clever combatant, this Pokémon battles using water balloons created with moisture secreted from its palms.
name: drizzile

description: It has many hidden capabilities, such as fingertips that can shoot water and a membrane on its back that it can use to glide through the air.
name: inteleon

description: Found throughout the Galar region, this Pokémon becomes uneasy if its cheeks are ever completely empty of berries.
name: skwovet

description: It stashes berries in its tail—so many berries that they fall out constantly. But this Pokémon is a bit slow-witted, so it doesn’t notice the loss.
name: greedent

description: It will bravely challenge any opponent, no matter how powerful. This Pokémon benefits from every battle—even a defeat increases its strength a bit.
name: rookidee

description: Smart enough to use tools in battle, these Pokémon have been seen picking up rocks and flinging them or using ropes to wrap up enemies.
name: corvisquire

description: This Pokémon reigns supreme in the skies of the Galar region. The black luster of its steel body could drive terror into the heart of any foe.
name: corviknight

description: A constant collector of information, this Pokémon is very smart. Very strong is what it isn’t.
name: blipbug

description: It barely moves, but it’s still alive. Hiding in its shell without food or water seems to have awakened its psychic powers.
name: dottler

description: It’s famous for its high level of intelligence, and the large size of its brain is proof that it also possesses immense psychic power.
name: orbeetle

description: Aided by the soft pads on its feet, it silently raids the food stores of other Pokémon. It survives off its ill-gotten gains.
name: nickit

description: It secretly marks potential targets with a scent. By following the scent, it stalks its targets and steals from them when they least expect it.
name: thievul

description: It anchors itself in the ground with its single leg, then basks in the sun. After absorbing enough sunlight, its petals spread as it blooms brilliantly.
name: gossifleur

description: The seeds attached to its cotton fluff are full of nutrients. It spreads them on the wind so that plants and other Pokémon can benefit from them.
name: eldegoss

description: Its curly fleece is such an effective cushion that this Pokémon could fall off a cliff and stand right back up at the bottom, unharmed.
name: wooloo

description: Weave a carpet from its springy wool, and you end up with something closer to a trampoline. You’ll start to bounce the moment you set foot on it.
name: dubwool

description: Apparently the itch of its teething impels it to snap its jaws at anything in front of it.
name: chewtle

description: With jaws that can shear through steel rods, this highly aggressive Pokémon chomps down on its unfortunate prey.
name: drednaw

description: This Pokémon is very popular as a herding dog in the Galar region. As it runs, it generates electricity from the base of its tail.
name: yamper

description: This Pokémon generates electricity and channels it into its legs to keep them going strong. Boltund can run nonstop for three full days.
name: boltund

description: Most of its body has the same composition as coal. Fittingly, this Pokémon was first discovered in coal mines about 400 years ago.
name: rolycoly

description: It forms coal inside its body. Coal dropped by this Pokémon once helped fuel the lives of people in the Galar region.
name: carkol

description: It’s usually peaceful, but the vandalism of mines enrages it. Offenders will be incinerated with flames that reach 2,700 degrees Fahrenheit.
name: coalossal

description: It spends its entire life inside an apple. It hides from its natural enemies, bird Pokémon, by pretending it’s just an apple and nothing more.
name: applin

description: It ate a sour apple, and that induced its evolution. In its cheeks, it stores an acid capable of causing chemical burns.
name: flapple

description: Eating a sweet apple caused its evolution. A nectarous scent wafts from its body, luring in the bug Pokémon it preys on.
name: appletun

description: As it digs, it swallows sand and stores it in its neck pouch. The pouch can hold more than 17 pounds of sand.
name: silicobra

description: When it contracts its body, over 220 pounds of sand sprays from its nose. If it ever runs out of sand, it becomes disheartened.
name: sandaconda

description: It’s so strong that it can knock out some opponents in a single hit, but it also may forget what it’s battling midfight.
name: cramorant

description: If it sees any movement around it, this Pokémon charges for it straightaway, leading with its sharply pointed jaw. It’s very proud of that jaw.
name: arrokuda

description: This Pokémon has a jaw that’s as sharp as a spear and as strong as steel. Apparently Barraskewda’s flesh is surprisingly tasty, too.
name: barraskewda

description: It stores poison in an internal poison sac and secretes that poison through its skin. If you touch this Pokémon, a tingling sensation follows.
name: toxel

description: When this Pokémon sounds as if it’s strumming a guitar, it’s actually clawing at the protrusions on its chest to generate electricity.
name: toxtricity-amped

description: It stores flammable gas in its body and uses it to generate heat. The yellow sections on its belly get particularly hot.
name: sizzlipede

description: When it heats up, its body temperature reaches about 1,500 degrees Fahrenheit. It lashes its body like a whip and launches itself at enemies.
name: centiskorch

description: It’s very curious, but its means of investigating things is to try to punch them with its tentacles. The search for food is what brings it onto land.
name: clobbopus

description: A body made up of nothing but muscle makes the grappling moves this Pokémon performs with its tentacles tremendously powerful.
name: grapploct

description: This Pokémon is said to have been born when a lonely spirit possessed a cold, leftover cup of tea.
name: sinistea

description: This species lives in antique teapots. Most pots are forgeries, but on rare occasions, an authentic work is found.
name: polteageist

description: Via the protrusion on its head, it senses other creatures’ emotions. If you don’t have a calm disposition, it will never warm up to you.
name: hatenna

description: No matter who you are, if you bring strong emotions near this Pokémon, it will silence you violently.
name: hattrem

description: It emits psychic power strong enough to cause headaches as a deterrent to the approach of others.
name: hatterene

description: Through its nose, it sucks in the emanations produced by people and Pokémon when they feel annoyed. It thrives off this negative energy.
name: impidimp

description: When it gets down on all fours as if to beg for forgiveness, it’s trying to lure opponents in so that it can stab them with its spear-like hair.
name: morgrem

description: With the hair wrapped around its body helping to enhance its muscles, this Pokémon can overwhelm even Machamp.
name: grimmsnarl

description: Its voice is staggering in volume. Obstagoon has a tendency to take on a threatening posture and shout—this move is known as Obstruct.
name: obstagoon

description: What appears to be an iron helmet is actually hardened hair. This Pokémon lives for the thrill of battle.
name: perrserker

description: Its shell is overflowing with its heightened otherworldly energy. The ectoplasm serves as protection for this Pokémon’s core spirit.
name: cursola

description: Only Farfetch’d that have survived many battles can attain this evolution. When this Pokémon’s leek withers, it will retire from combat.
name: sirfetchd

description: It’s highly skilled at tap-dancing. It waves its cane of ice in time with its graceful movements.
name: mr-rime

description: A powerful curse was woven into an ancient painting. After absorbing the spirit of a Yamask, the painting began to move.
name: runerigus

description: This Pokémon was born from sweet-smelling particles in the air. Its body is made of cream.
name: milcery

description: When it trusts a Trainer, it will treat them to berries it’s decorated with cream.
name: alcremie

description: Five of them are troopers, and one is the brass. The brass’s orders are absolute.
name: falinks

description: It feeds on seaweed, using its teeth to scrape it off rocks. Electric current flows from the tips of its spines.
name: pincurchin

description: It spits out thread imbued with a frigid sort of energy and uses it to tie its body to branches, disguising itself as an icicle while it sleeps.
name: snom

description: Icy scales fall from its wings like snow as it flies over fields and mountains. The temperature of its wings is less than −290 degrees Fahrenheit.
name: frosmoth

description: It stands in grasslands, watching the sun’s descent from zenith to horizon. This Pokémon has a talent for delivering dynamic kicks.
name: stonjourner

description: It drifted in on the flow of ocean waters from a frigid place. It keeps its head iced constantly to make sure it stays nice and cold.
name: eiscue-ice

description: It uses the horns on its head to sense the emotions of others. Males will act as valets for those they serve, looking after their every need.
name: indeedee-male

description: As it eats the seeds stored up in its pocket-like pouches, this Pokémon is not just satisfying its constant hunger. It’s also generating electricity.
name: morpeko-full-belly

description: It digs up the ground with its trunk. It’s also very strong, being able to carry loads of over five tons without any problem at all.
name: cufant

description: They came over from another region long ago and worked together with humans. Their green skin is resistant to water.
name: copperajah

description: In ancient times, it was unbeatable thanks to its powerful lower body, but it went extinct anyway after it depleted all its plant-based food sources.
name: dracozolt

description: The shaking of its freezing upper half is what generates its electricity. It has a hard time walking around.
name: arctozolt

description: Powerful legs and jaws made it the apex predator of its time. Its own overhunting of its prey was what drove it to extinction.
name: dracovish

description: Though it’s able to capture prey by freezing its surroundings, it has trouble eating the prey afterward because its mouth is on top of its head.
name: arctovish

description: Its body resembles polished metal, and it’s both lightweight and strong. The only drawback is that it rusts easily.
name: duraludon

description: After being reborn as a ghost Pokémon, Dreepy wanders the areas it used to inhabit back when it was alive in prehistoric seas.
name: dreepy

description: It’s capable of flying faster than 120 mph. It battles alongside Dreepy and dotes on them until they successfully evolve.
name: drakloak

description: When it isn’t battling, it keeps Dreepy in the holes on its horns. Once a fight starts, it launches the Dreepy like supersonic missiles.
name: dragapult

description: Known as a legendary hero, this Pokémon absorbs metal particles, transforming them into a weapon it uses to battle.
name: zacian

description: In times past, it worked together with a king of the people to save the Galar region. It absorbs metal that it then uses in battle.
name: zamazenta

description: The core on its chest absorbs energy emanating from the lands of the Galar region. This energy is what allows Eternatus to stay active.
name: eternatus

description: Kubfu trains hard to perfect its moves. The moves it masters will determine which form it takes when it evolves.
name: kubfu

description: This form of Urshifu is a strong believer in the one-hit KO. Its strategy is to leap in close to foes and land a devastating blow with a hardened fist.
name: urshifu-single-strike

description: Within dense forests, this Pokémon lives in a pack with others of its kind. It’s incredibly aggressive, and the other Pokémon of the forest fear it.
name: zarude

description: This Pokémon is a cluster of electrical energy. It’s said that removing the rings on Regieleki’s body will unleash the Pokémon’s latent power.
name: regieleki

description: An academic theory proposes that Regidrago’s arms were once the head of an ancient dragon Pokémon. The theory remains unproven.
name: regidrago

description: Glastrier emits intense cold from its hooves. It’s also a belligerent Pokémon—anything it wants, it takes by force.
name: glastrier

description: It probes its surroundings with all its senses save one—it doesn’t use its sense of sight. Spectrier’s kicks are said to separate soul from body.
name: spectrier

description: Calyrex is a merciful Pokémon, capable of providing healing and blessings. It reigned over the Galar region in times of yore.
name: calyrex

description: The black orbs shine with an uncanny light when the Pokémon is erecting invisible barriers. The fur shed from its beard retains heat well and is a highly useful material for winter clothing.
name: wyrdeer

description: A violent creature that fells towering trees with its crude axes and shields itself with hard stone. If one should chance upon this Pokémon in the wilds, one's only recourse is to flee.
name: kleavor

description: I believe it was Hisui's swampy terrain that gave Ursaluna its burly physique and newfound capacity to manipulate peat at will.
name: ursaluna

description: Clads itself in the souls of comrades that perished before fulfilling their goals of journeying upstream. No other species throughout all Hisui's rivers is Basculegion's equal.
name: basculegion-male

description: Because of Sneasler's virulent poison and daunting physical prowess, no other species could hope to best it on the frozen highlands. Preferring solitude, this species does not form packs.
name: sneasler

description: Its lancelike spikes and savage temperament have earned it the nickname ”sea fiend.” It slurps up poison to nourish itself.
name: overqwil

description: When it flies to this land from across the sea, the bitter winter comes to an end. According to legend, this Pokémon's love gives rise to the budding of fresh life across Hisui.
name: enamorus-incarnate

description: Its fluffy fur is similar in composition to plants. This Pokémon frequently washes its face to keep it from drying out.
name: sprigatito

description: Floragato deftly wields the vine hidden beneath its long fur, slamming the hard flower bud against its opponents.
name: floragato

description: This Pokémon uses the reflective fur lining its cape to camouflage the stem of its flower, creating the illusion that the flower is floating.
name: meowscarada

description: It lies on warm rocks and uses the heat absorbed by its square-shaped scales to create fire energy.
name: fuecoco

description: The combination of Crocalor’s fire energy and overflowing vitality has caused an egg-shaped fireball to appear on the Pokémon’s head.
name: crocalor

description: The fiery bird changes shape when Skeledirge sings. Rumor has it that the bird was born when the fireball on Skeledirge’s head gained a soul.
name: skeledirge

description: This Pokémon migrated to Paldea from distant lands long ago. The gel secreted by its feathers repels water and grime."
name: quaxly

description: These Pokémon constantly run through shallow waters to train their legs, then compete with each other to see which of them kicks most gracefully.
name: quaxwell

description: A single kick from a Quaquaval can send a truck rolling. This Pokémon uses its powerful legs to perform striking dances from far-off lands.
name: quaquaval

description: It searches for food all day. It possesses a keen sense of smell but doesn’t use it for anything other than foraging.
name: lechonk

description: Oinkologne is proud of its fine, glossy skin. It emits a concentrated scent from the tip of its tail.
name: oinkologne-male

description: The ball of threads wrapped around its body is elastic enough to deflect the scythes of Scyther, this Pokémon’s natural enemy.
name: tarountula

description: It clings to branches and ceilings using its threads and moves without a sound. It takes out its prey before the prey even notices it.
name: spidops

description: It has its third set of legs folded up. When it’s in a tough spot, this Pokémon jumps over 30 feet using the strength of its legs.
name: nymble

description: When it decides to fight all out, it stands on its previously folded legs to enter Showdown Mode. It neutralizes its enemies in short order.
name: lokix

description: It has underdeveloped electric sacs on its cheeks. These sacs can produce electricity only if Pawmi rubs them furiously with the pads on its forepaws.
name: pawmi

description: When its group is attacked, Pawmo is the first to leap into battle, defeating enemies with a fighting technique that utilizes electric shocks.
name: pawmo

description: This Pokémon normally is slow to react, but once it enters battle, it will strike down its enemies with lightning-fast movements.
name: pawmot

description: Exhibiting great teamwork, they use their incisors to cut pieces out of any material that might be useful for a nest, then make off with them.
name: tandemaus

description: The two little ones just appeared one day. The group might be a family of related Pokémon, but nobody knows for sure.
name: maushold-family-of-four

description: This Pokémon is smooth and moist to the touch. Yeast in Fidough’s breath induces fermentation in the Pokémon’s vicinity.
name: fidough

description: The pleasant aroma that emanates from this Pokémon’s body helps wheat grow, so Dachsbun has been treasured by farming villages.
name: dachsbun

description: It protects itself from enemies by emitting oil from the fruit on its head. This oil is bitter and astringent enough to make someone flinch.
name: smoliv

description: Dolliv shares its tasty, fresh-scented oil with others. This species has coexisted with humans since times long gone.
name: dolliv

description: This calm Pokémon is very compassionate. It will share its delicious, nutrient-rich oil with weakened Pokémon.
name: arboliva

description: These Pokémon prefer to live in cities. They form flocks based on the color of their feathers, and they fight over territory.
name: squawkabilly-green-plumage

description: It was born in a layer of rock salt deep under the earth. This species was particularly treasured in the old days, as they would share precious salt.
name: nacli

description: This Pokémon dry cures its prey by spraying salt over them. The curing process steals away the water in the prey’s body.
name: naclstack

description: Garganacl will rub its fingertips together and sprinkle injured Pokémon with salt. Even severe wounds will promptly heal afterward.
name: garganacl

description: Burnt charcoal came to life and became a Pokémon. Possessing a fiery fighting spirit, Charcadet will battle even tough opponents.
name: charcadet

description: Armarouge evolved through the use of a set of armor that belonged to a distinguished warrior. This Pokémon is incredibly loyal.
name: armarouge

description: The fiery blades on its arms burn fiercely with the lingering resentment of a sword wielder who fell before accomplishing their goal.
name: ceruledge

description: Tadbulb shakes its tail to generate electricity. If it senses danger, it will make its head blink on and off to alert its allies.
name: tadbulb

description: When this Pokémon expands and contracts its wobbly body, the belly-button dynamo in its stomach produces a huge amount of electricity.
name: bellibolt

description: When its wings catch the wind, the bones within produce electricity. This Pokémon dives into the ocean, catching prey by electrocuting them.
name: wattrel

description: Kilowattrel inflates its throat sac to amplify its electricity. By riding the wind, this Pokémon can fly over 430 miles in a day.
name: kilowattrel

description: It always scowls in an attempt to make opponents take it seriously, but even crying children will burst into laughter when they see Maschiff’s face.
name: maschiff

description: This Pokémon can store energy in its large dewlap. Mabosstiff unleashes this energy all at once to blow away enemies.
name: mabosstiff

description: Though usually a mellow Pokémon, it will sink its sharp, poison-soaked front teeth into any that anger it, causing paralysis in the object of its ire.
name: shroodle

description: The color of the poisonous saliva depends on what the Pokémon eats. Grafaiai covers its fingers in its saliva and draws patterns on trees in forests.
name: grafaiai

description: A soul unable to move on to the afterlife was blown around by the wind until it got tangled up with dried grass and became a Pokémon.
name: bramblin

description: It will open the branches of its head to envelop its prey. Once it absorbs all the life energy it needs, it expels the prey and discards it.
name: brambleghast

description: Toedscool lives in muggy forests. The flaps that fall from its body are chewy and very delicious.
name: toedscool

description: These Pokémon gather into groups and form colonies deep within forests. They absolutely hate it when strangers approach.
name: toedscruel

description: Klawf hangs upside-down from cliffs, waiting for prey. But Klawf can’t remain in this position for long because its blood rushes to its head.
name: klawf

description: The more sunlight this Pokémon bathes in, the more spicy chemicals are produced by its body, and thus the spicier its moves become.
name: capsakid

description: The red head converts spicy chemicals into fire energy and blasts the surrounding area with a super spicy stream of flame.
name: scovillain

description: This Pokémon creates a mud ball by mixing sand and dirt with psychic energy. It treasures its mud ball more than its own life.
name: rellor

description: The body that supports the ball barely moves. Therefore, it is thought that the true body of this Pokémon is actually inside the ball.
name: rabsca

description: Flittle’s toes levitate about half an inch above the ground because of the psychic power emitted from the frills on the Pokémon’s belly.
name: flittle

description: It immobilizes opponents by bathing them in psychic power from its large eyes. Despite its appearance, it has a vicious temperament.
name: espathra

description: It swings its handmade hammer around to protect itself, but the hammer is often stolen by Pokémon that eat metal.
name: tinkatink

description: This Pokémon will attack groups of Pawniard and Bisharp, gathering metal from them in order to create a large and sturdy hammer.
name: tinkatuff

description: This intelligent Pokémon has a very daring disposition. It knocks rocks into the sky with its hammer, aiming for flying Corviknight.
name: tinkaton

description: This Pokémon can pick up the scent of a Veluza just over 65 feet away and will hide itself in the sand.
name: wiglett

description: It has a vicious temperament, contrary to what its appearance may suggest. It wraps its long bodies around prey, then drags the prey into its den.
name: wugtrio

description: It gathers things up in an apron made from shed feathers added to the Pokémon’s chest feathers, then drops those things from high places for fun.
name: bombirdier

description: It likes playing with others of its kind using the water ring on its tail. It uses ultrasonic waves to sense the emotions of other living creatures.
name: finizen

description: This Pokémon changes its appearance if it hears its allies calling for help. Palafin will never show anybody its moment of transformation.
name: palafin-zero

description: It is said that this Pokémon was born when an unknown poison Pokémon entered and inspirited an engine left at a scrap-processing factory.
name: varoom

description: It creates a gas out of poison and minerals from rocks. It then detonates the gas in its cylinders—now numbering eight—to generate energy.
name: revavroom

description: Apparently Cyclizar has been allowing people to ride on its back since ancient times. Depictions of this have been found in 10,000-year-old murals.
name: cyclizar

description: When attacked, this Pokémon will wield the tendrils on its body like fists and pelt the opponent with a storm of punches.
name: orthworm

description: It absorbs nutrients from cave walls. The petals it wears are made of crystallized poison.
name: glimmet

description: When this Pokémon detects danger, it will open up its crystalline petals and fire beams from its conical body.
name: glimmora

description: It is said that a dog Pokémon that died in the wild without ever interacting with a human was reborn as this Pokémon.
name: greavard

description: Houndstone spends most of its time sleeping in graveyards. Among all the dog Pokémon, this one is most loyal to its master.
name: houndstone

description: This Pokémon apparently ties the base of its neck into a knot so that energy stored in its belly does not escape from its beak.
name: flamigo

description: This species left the ocean and began living on land a very long time ago. It seems to be closely related to Wailmer.
name: cetoddle

description: This Pokémon wanders around snowy, icy areas. It protects its body with powerful muscles and a thick layer of fat under its skin.
name: cetitan

description: When Veluza discards unnecessary flesh, its mind becomes honed and its psychic power increases. The spare flesh has a mild but delicious flavor.
name: veluza

description: This Pokémon is a glutton, but it’s bad at getting food. It teams up with a Tatsugiri to catch prey.
name: dondozo

description: This is a small dragon Pokémon. It lives inside the mouth of Dondozo to protect itself from enemies on the outside.
name: tatsugiri-curly

description: When its anger rose beyond a critical point, this Pokémon gained power that is unfettered by the limits of its physical body.
name: annihilape

description: When attacked, this Pokémon will retaliate by sticking thick spines out from its body. It’s a risky move that puts everything on the line.
name: clodsire

description: Now that the brain waves from the head and tail are synced up, the psychic power of this Pokémon is 10 times stronger than Girafarig’s.
name: farigiraf

description: This Pokémon uses its hard tail to make its nest by boring holes into bedrock deep underground. The nest can reach lengths of over six miles.
name: dudunsparce-two-segment

description: Only a Bisharp that stands above all others in its vast army can evolve into Kingambit.
name: kingambit

description: Sightings of this Pokémon have occurred in recent years. The name Great Tusk was taken from a creature listed in a certain book.
name: great-tusk

description: There has been only one reported sighting of this Pokémon. It resembles a mysterious creature depicted in an old expedition journal.
name: scream-tail

description: It is possible that the creature listed as Brute Bonnet in a certain book could actually be this Pokémon.
name: brute-bonnet

description: This Pokémon has characteristics similar to those of Flutter Mane, a creature mentioned in a certain book.
name: flutter-mane

description: This mysterious Pokémon has some similarities to a creature that an old book introduced as Slither Wing.
name: slither-wing

description: No records exist of this Pokémon being caught. Data is lacking, but the Pokémon’s traits match up with a creature shown in an expedition journal.
name: sandy-shocks

description: This Pokémon closely resembles a scientific weapon that a paranormal magazine claimed was sent to this planet by aliens.
name: iron-treads

description: Its shape is similar to a robot featured in a paranormal magazine article. The robot was said to have been created by an ancient civilization.
name: iron-bundle

description: It is very similar to a cyborg covered exclusively by a paranormal magazine. The cyborg was said to be the modified form of a certain athlete.
name: iron-hands

description: It resembles a certain Pokémon introduced in a paranormal magazine, described as the offspring of a Hydreigon that fell in love with a robot.
name: iron-jugulis

description: This Pokémon resembles an unknown object described in a paranormal magazine as a UFO sent to observe humanity.
name: iron-moth

description: It has some similarities to a Pokémon introduced in a dubious magazine as a Tyranitar from one billion years into the future.
name: iron-thorns

description: Frigibax absorbs heat through its dorsal fin and converts the heat into ice energy. The higher the temperature, the more energy Frigibax stores.
name: frigibax

description: Arctibax freezes the air around it, protecting its face with an ice mask and turning its dorsal fin into a blade of ice.
name: arctibax

description: This Pokémon blasts cryogenic air out from its mouth. This air can instantly freeze even liquid-hot lava.
name: baxcalibur

description: This Pokémon was born inside a treasure chest about 1,500 years ago. It sucks the life-force out of scoundrels who try to steal the treasure.
name: gimmighoul

description: Its body seems to be made up of 1,000 coins. This Pokémon gets along well with others and is quick to make friends with anybody.
name: gholdengo

description: The grudge of a person punished for writing the king’s evil deeds upon wooden tablets has clad itself in dead leaves to become a Pokémon.
name: wo-chien

description: This Pokémon can control 100 tons of fallen snow. It plays around innocently by leaping in and out of avalanches it has caused.
name: chien-pao

description: The fear poured into an ancient ritual vessel has clad itself in rocks and dirt to become a Pokémon.
name: ting-lu

description: It controls flames burning at over 5,400 degrees Fahrenheit. It casually swims through the sea of lava it creates by melting rock and sand.
name: chi-yu

description: It is possible that this is the creature listed as Roaring Moon in an expedition journal that still holds many mysteries.
name: roaring-moon

description: It has some similarities to a mad scientist’s invention covered in a paranormal magazine.
name: iron-valiant

description: This seems to be the Winged King mentioned in an old expedition journal. It was said to have split the land with its bare fists.
name: koraidon

description: Much remains unknown about this creature. It resembles Cyclizar, but it is far more ruthless and powerful.
name: miraidon

description: This ferocious creature is shrouded in mystery. It's named after an aquatic monster mentioned in an old expedition journal.
name: walking-wake

description: Many of its physical characteristics match those of a Virizion from the future that was covered in a paranormal magazine.
name: iron-leaves

description: Dipplin is two creatures in one Pokémon. Its evolution was triggered by a special apple grown only in one place.
name: dipplin

description: Supposedly, the regrets of a tea ceremony master who died before perfecting his craft lingered in some matcha and became a Pokémon.
name: poltchageist

description: It pretends to be tea, trying to fool people into drinking it so it can drain their life-force. Its ruse is generally unsuccessful.
name: sinistcha

description: After all its muscles were stimulated by the toxic chain around its neck, Okidogi transformed and gained a powerful physique.
name: okidogi

description: The chain is made from toxins that enhance capabilities. It stimulated Munkidori's brain and caused the Pokémon's psychic powers to bloom.
name: munkidori

description: Fezandipiti owes its beautiful looks and lovely voice to the toxic stimulants emanating from the chain wrapped around its body.
name: fezandipiti

description: This Pokémon's type changes based on which mask it's wearing. It confounds its enemies with nimble movements and kicks.
name: ogerpon

description: It gathers static electricity from its surroundings. The beams it launches when down on all fours are tremendously powerful.
name: archaludon

description: Seven syrpents live inside an apple made of syrup. The syrpent in the center is the commander.
name: hydrapple

description: There are scant few reports of this creature being sighted. One short video shows it rampaging and spouting pillars of flame.
name: gouging-fire

description: It's said to incinerate everything around it with lightning launched from its fur. Very little is known about this creature.
name: raging-bolt

description: It resembles a Pokémon described in a dubious magazine as a Terrakion that had been modified by an evil organization.
name: iron-boulder

description: It resembles a mysterious object introduced in a paranormal magazine as a cutting-edge weapon shaped like a Cobalion.
name: iron-crown

description: Terapagos protects itself using its power to transform energy into hard crystals. This Pokémon is the source of the Terastal phenomenon.
name: terapagos

description: It feeds others toxic mochi that draw out desires and capabilities. Those who eat the mochi fall under Pecharunt’s control, chained to its will.
name: pecharunt
